name: plan-mode
description: Claude Code / OpenCode-style plan mode for pi — read-only exploration, parallel explore agents, plan written to a single file, explicit plan_enter/plan_exit tools. Pattern-based permission ruleset.

scripts.test: npm run typecheck && node --test test/permissions.test.ts test/utils.test.ts test/smoke.test.ts

@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent.comments: Resolved from the user's globally-installed pi package. Set a concrete version range before publishing.
